markdownRemark.html:
Scenes written about in our dreams,
Lighted by the still frail sunbeams,
Harlot rose beside virgin white,
Making our eyes light up so bright,
Lands regain colour bit by bit,
A waking up of wood spirits,
Nature is now coming alive,
Beauty is gradually revived,
Poetry following bleak prose,
Colour that only spring months know,
There's promises of better days,
Rain vies to wash it all away,
There's a climax as winter's hushed,
The seduction of English blush,
Warming winds scatter the blossom,
From the south blow changes to come.

markdownRemark.rawMarkdownBody:
Scenes written about in our dreams,  
Lighted by the still frail sunbeams,  
Harlot rose beside virgin white,  
Making our eyes light up so bright,  
Lands regain colour bit by bit,  
A waking up of wood spirits,  
Nature is now coming alive,  
Beauty is gradually revived,  
Poetry following bleak prose,  
Colour that only spring months know,  
There's promises of better days,  
Rain vies to wash it all away,  
There's a climax as winter's hushed,  
The seduction of English blush,  
Warming winds scatter the blossom,  
From the south blow changes to come.
